What is DESIGN.md?AboutStar...
Sign in
Back to designs

Design System inspired by Expo

React Native platform. Dark theme, tight letter-spacing, code-centric.

Usage

npx getdesign@latest add expo

Run this command from your project root, then ask your AI assistant to use DESIGN.md for UI work.

SAVE

Installs

—

Bookmarked

—

✦

Not an official Expo design system. A curated starting point for building expo-like UIs with your AI coding agent.

Expo builds on React Native platform and carries it with dark theme, tight letter-spacing, code-centric. It is a strong fit for mobile dev platforms, documentation sites, and developer portals.

Preview

Maintained by VoltAgent team
getdesign.md— Design system inspirations from popular websites. Drop one in, let AI build matching UI.

state.title: Try to fetch raw design.md from GitHub

parts.text:
I found the preview HTML which contains a lot of the design system information. Let me also try to get the raw DESIGN.md content directly from GitHub to see if it exists there. But based on what I found in the preview.html, I now have a comprehensive understanding of the Expo design system.

Let me summarize what I've found:

1. **Design.md files** - The original design.md has been moved to an external site (getdesign.md). The GitHub repo only has a README.md redirecting to the external site.

2. **Design Language & Visual Style** - The preview.html gives us the complete picture:
   - Dark theme foundation (inherited from React Native platform)
   - Code-centric aesthetic
   - Tight letter-spacing
   - Clean, geometric precision

3. **Colors** - I have the full color palette:
   - Primary: Expo Black (#000000), Near Black (#1c2024)
   - Secondary/Accent: Link Cobalt (#0d74ce), Legal Blue (#476cff), Widget Sky (#47c2ff), Preview Purple (#8145b5)
   - Surface: Cloud Gray (#f0f0f3), Pure White (#ffffff), Widget Dark (#1a1a1a), Banner Dark (#171717)
   - Neutrals: Slate Gray (#60646c), Mid Slate (#555860), Silver (#b0b4ba), Dark Slate (#363a3f)
   - Semantic: Warning Amber (#ab6400), Destructive Rose (#eb8e90), Border Lavender (#e0e1e6), Input Border (#d9d9e0)

4. **Typography**:
   - Body: Inter (400, 500, 600, 700, 800, 900 weights)
   - Code/Mono: JetBrains Mono
   - Scale: 12px to 60px with varying weights and line heights
   - Display Hero: 60px / 700 / -3px letter-spacing
   - Section Heading: 48px / 600 / -2px letter-spacing

5. **Components**:
   - Buttons: Primary pill (dark), Standard (white), Dark rounded (32px radius)
   - Cards: Standard, Elevated (whisper), Featured (glow) with 8px radius
   - Code blocks with dark near-black background

6. **What makes it distinctive/beautiful**:
   - Bold contrast between pure black and cloud gray backgrounds
   - Tight letter-spacing creates a refined, modern aesthetic
   - Generous border-radius on primary buttons for approachability
   - Inter and JetBrains Mono pairing reinforces the developer-focused identity

7. **Design Structure**:
   - Organized around color, typography, and component categories with consistent spacing and elevation systems
   - Fully documented in preview.html at https://getdesign.md/design-md/expo/preview.html

Excellent! I found the complete Expo design system. Here's my comprehensive analysis:

---

## Expo Design System Analysis

### 1. Design.md Files

**The actual `design.md` content has been migrated to an external site.** The GitHub repo (`/design-md/expo/`) only contains a redirect README pointing to:
- **https://getdesign.md/expo/design-md**

The live preview with all design tokens is at:
- **https://getdesign.md/design-md/expo/preview.html**

---

### 2. Design Language, Visual Style, Colors, Typography, Components

#### **Overall Character**
- **Dark theme** foundation (React Native platform heritage)
- **Code-centric** aesthetic - tight letter-spacing, monospace accents
- **Geometric precision** - clean, modern, developer-focused
- Strong fit for mobile dev platforms, documentation sites, and developer portals

#### **Color Palette**

| Role | Color Name | Hex | Usage |
|------|-----------|-----|-------|
| **Primary** | Expo Black | `#000000` | Headlines, CTA buttons, brand anchor |
| | Near Black | `#1c2024` | Body text (softer than pure black) |
| **Accent** | Link Cobalt | `#0d74ce` | Standard links, interactive signals |
| | Legal Blue | `#476cff` | Footer/legal links, brighter accent |
| | Widget Sky | `#47c2ff` | Widget branding, lightest accent |
| | Preview Purple | `#8145b5` | Beta/preview feature indicators |
| **Surface** | Cloud Gray | `#f0f0f3` | Primary page background |
| | Pure White | `#ffffff` | Card surfaces, elevated containers |
| | Widget Dark | `#1a1a1a` | Dark theme widgets, overlays |
| | Banner Dark | `#171717` | Promo banners, high-contrast surfaces |
| **Neutrals** | Slate Gray | `#60646c` | Secondary text |
| | Mid Slate | `#555860` | Emphasized secondary text |
| | Silver | `#b0b4ba` | Tertiary text, placeholders |
| | Dark Slate | `#363a3f` | Borders on dark surfaces |
| **Semantic** | Warning Amber | `#ab6400` | Warning states |
| | Destructive Rose | `#eb8e90` | Disabled destructive actions |
| | Border Lavender | `#e0e1e6` | Standard borders |
| | Input Border | `#d9d9e0` | Form elements |

#### **Typography**

| Style | Font | Size | Weight | Line Height | Letter Spacing |
|-------|------|------|--------|-------------|----------------|
| Display Hero | Inter | 60px | 700 | 1.10 | -3px |
| Section Heading | Inter | 48px | 600 | 1.10 | -2px |
| Sub-heading | Inter | 20px | 600 | 1.20 | -0.25px |
| Body Large | Inter | 18px | 400-500 | 1.40 | normal |
| Body / Button | Inter | 16px | 400-700 | 1.25-1.40 | normal |
| Caption / Label | Inter | 14px | 400-600 | 1.00-1.40 | normal |
| Tag / Small | Inter | 12px | 500 | 1.00-1.60 | normal |
| Code Body | JetBrains Mono | 16px | 400-600 | 1.40 | normal |
| Code Caption | JetBrains Mono | 14px | 400-600 | 1.40 | normal |
| Code Small/Tag | JetBrains Mono | 12px | 400 | 1.60 | uppercase |

#### **Components**

**Buttons:**
- **Primary Pill (Dark)**: `background: #000`, white text, `border-radius: 9999px`, 12x28px padding
- **Standard (White)**: white bg, near-black text, 1px border, 6px radius
- **Dark Rounded**: `border-radius: 32px`, 12x24px padding

**Cards:**
- **Standard**: 1px Border Lavender border, 8px radius, white surface
- **Elevated (Whisper)**: subtle shadow `0px 3px 6px, 0px 2px 4px`
- **Featured (Glow)**: stronger shadow, 16px radius for hero content

**Code Blocks:**
- Near-black background (`#1c2024`), 1px dark slate border, 8px radius
- JetBrains Mono font, `#f2f2f2` text color

**Elevation System:**
- Flat, Surface, Whisper, Elevated, Modal levels with progressive shadows

---

### 3. What Makes It Distinctive/Beautiful

1. **Bold Contrast**: Pure black (`#000000`) against cloud gray (`#f0f0f3`) creates dramatic visual impact
2. **Tight Letter-Spacing**: Headlines use -2px to -3px tracking for a modern, compact feel
3. **Pill Buttons**: Extensive use of `border-radius: 9999px` on CTAs gives approachability to the technical brand
4. **Code-Centric Typography**: JetBrains Mono for all code reinforces the developer platform identity
5. **Layered Grays**: Multiple gray tones (Slate, Mid Slate, Silver, Dark Slate) create depth without color
6. **Accent Blues & Purples**: Cobalt, Legal Blue, and Widget Sky provide fresh, tech-forward highlights
7. **Consistent 8px Grid**: Spacing and radius values follow a cohesive system

---

### 4. Design Structure

The design is organized into numbered sections:
1. **01 / Color Palette** - Primary, Secondary/Accent, Surface/Background, Neutrals, Semantic
2. **02 / Typography Scale** - Display through Code Small with exact specifications
3. **03 / Button Variants** - Primary, Standard, Dark Rounded with code examples
4. **04 / Card Examples** - Standard, Elevated, Featured variants
5. **05 / Spacing** - 8px-based spacing scale
6. **06 / Radius** - 2px to 16px radius values
7. **07 / Elevation** - Whisper through Modal shadow systems

---

### File Locations

| File | Path |
|------|------|
| GitHub redirect | `/design-md/expo/README.md` |
| External design site | `https://getdesign.md/expo/design-md` |
| Live preview (HTML) | `https://getdesign.md/design-md/expo/preview.html` |

**Note**: To use this design, run `npx getdesign@latest add expo` from your project root, then ask your AI assistant to use `DESIGN.md` for UI work.
